overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy video game (Bloodborne) showing a hunter character exploring a vast gothic cathedral interior. The character ascends a grand staircase, traverses a candlelit nave with towering columns, approaches an ornate golden altar with a suspended statue, then descends into a darker lower section of the cathedral.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to cathedral interior

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone staircase toward the gothic archway entrance

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading upward
large pointed archway with intricate stone carvings framing the entrance
ornate stone balconies with gothic railings on the upper levels
lit candles mounted on the stone walls providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the bottom of a grand stone staircase in a dimly lit gothic structure. The camera follows from behind as the character ascends the stairs toward a large archway entrance, with candle sconces providing warm illumination against the cool stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral nave with towering columns and high vaulted ceiling

events.description: exits the staircase and enters the vast cathedral hall with towering columns

agents.ego_description: walking through the cathedral nave toward the distant ornate altar at the far end

entered.detail: tall gothic stone columns rising to the vaulted ceiling
elaborate golden altar structure with multiple tiers visible in the distance
intricate circular mosaic pattern on the marble floor
tall narrow windows with blue moonlight filtering through

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the staircase into a vast cathedral nave. Towering stone columns line both sides while moonlight filters through tall windows. The character walks across ornate floor mosaics toward a distant golden altar shrine at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: central altar area with elaborate golden shrine and suspended statue

events.description: character stops at the altar and looks up at the suspended statue
character turns right and begins walking away from the altar

agents.ego_description: approaching the ornate altar, pausing to observe the suspended statue above, then turning to explore the side area

entered.detail: multi-tiered golden shrine base with intricate carvings and candle arrangements
pale humanoid figure suspended in the air above the altar
numerous lit candles arranged around the base of the shrine

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the magnificent golden altar, revealing intricate details of the shrine and a mysterious suspended figure above it. After pausing to observe, the character turns right and begins walking away from the central altar toward a side corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: side corridor of the cathedral with tall windows and dark archway

agents.ego_description: walking along the side corridor away from the main altar area toward a dark passage

entered.detail: narrower corridor section with different architectural details leading away from the nave
dark archway entrance at the end of the corridor leading to a lower section

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a side corridor of the cathedral, leaving the grand altar behind. The lighting becomes dimmer as they approach a dark archway at the end of the hall, with tall windows now visible to the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase into lower dark cathedral section with ominous purple glow

events.description: descends stairs into a darker lower level of the cathedral with ominous lighting

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs into the dimly lit lower cathedral section toward a distant purple glow

entered.detail: steep stone stairs leading downward into darkness with bloodstains visible
long dark hall with stone columns and ominous atmosphere
mysterious purple light source glowing at the far end of the lower hall
gothic stone railings lining both sides of the descending staircase

segments.scene_description: The character descends a steep staircase into a darker, more ominous section of the cathedral. The environment becomes increasingly shadowy with stone railings lining the path, while a mysterious purple glow emanates from the far end of the lower hall ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic cathedral that transitions from a dimly lit ascent into a vast, moonlit sanctuary before descending into an ominous subterranean hall. It begins behind the character at the base of a stone staircase, following them upward through warm candlelit corridors toward a large archway. As the character emerges, the space expands into a massive nave where moonlight filters through towering windows and illuminates ornate floor mosaics leading toward a distant golden altar. The camera then closes in on the intricate details of the shrine and its suspended figure before turning away to follow the character through a dimming side corridor. Finally, the scene shifts as the character descends a steep staircase, leaving the grandeur behind for a shadowy lower section where a mysterious purple glow emanates from the darkness ahead.
